name: Skills Setup
description: Runs installed skill setup scripts through the admin-only skills.setup Gateway RPC. This intentionally executes trusted skill-declared local bash scripts, can receive explicit env/secrets for setup, and does not track completion state, so setup scripts must be reviewed, trusted, and idempotent.

timeoutMs.description: Default setup-script timeout in milliseconds. Callers may override per-request via params.timeoutMs; the maximum is always enforced.
